M1 Magician You approach love with initiative and confidence. You are rarely passive when you genuinely want someone, and you may naturally take the lead in beginning or directing the relationship.

Your availability depends on feeling independent, capable and respected. You need a relationship that allows you to remain yourself rather than making you feel controlled or diminished. In shadow, pride can make it difficult to admit vulnerability, accept criticism or forgive mistakes. You may believe you know what is best for both people and unintentionally dominate the connection.

Your relationship lesson is to lead without controlling, communicate openly and recognise that emotional partnership is collaboration, not a personal project for you to manage.

M2: The High Priestess

You approach love slowly and intuitively. You need time to observe someone, understand their emotional world and decide whether they are safe enough to trust.

You may be deeply sensitive but private, revealing feelings only when you sense genuine emotional depth. When overwhelmed, you are likely to retreat into silence or solitude rather than immediately discussing what is wrong. This can make you appear unavailable even when you care deeply.

Your lesson is to trust your intuition without hiding behind mystery, silence or emotional distance. A partner cannot understand feelings you never allow them to see.

M3: The Empress

You approach love through care, warmth, affection and the creation of emotional security. You are naturally nurturing and often show love by looking after people, creating comfort and making them feel valued.

Your availability can become tangled with overgiving, mothering or trying to control the relationship “for everyone’s own good”. You may lose yourself in the needs of a partner or expect love to be demonstrated through provision, attention and security. Family influence, particularly the maternal line, can strongly shape your relationship expectations.

Your lesson is to receive as well as give, maintain your own identity and choose a partner who contributes rather than simply accepts your care.

M4: The Emperor

You approach love seriously and practically. Reliability, loyalty, responsibility and long-term stability matter more to you than vague promises or dramatic declarations.

You are emotionally available when you feel respected and when the relationship has a clear direction. You may struggle to express softer emotions, preferring to solve problems, provide security or take control. In shadow, this can become rigidity, criticism, dominance or an expectation that your partner should follow your decisions.

Your lesson is to allow strength and tenderness to coexist. Emotional openness does not weaken your authority; it makes the relationship safer and more equal.

M5: The Hierophant

You approach love through shared values, trust, commitment and tradition. You are generally looking for something meaningful rather than temporary, and may view partnership or marriage as a serious spiritual and moral commitment.

You become available when you believe the other person shares your principles and long-term intentions. Before this energy matures, you may attract relationships that challenge your beliefs or repeat family expectations. In shadow, you can become rigid, preachy or convinced that your way of loving is the correct way.

Your lesson is to build commitment around shared values without imposing beliefs, family rules or outdated traditions on your partner.

M6: The Lovers

Love and partnership are central to how you understand yourself. You approach relationships romantically and need affection, beauty, emotional connection and a sense of being chosen.

Your availability may depend too heavily on receiving reassurance from another person. You can idealise love, seek external validation or become uncertain when required to make a clear choice. You may also demand more emotional energy from a partner than they can realistically provide.

Your lesson is self-love and emotional independence. Once you stop expecting a relationship to prove your worth, you can choose love clearly rather than from loneliness, fantasy or fear of rejection.

M7: The Chariot

You approach love with momentum, enthusiasm and purpose. Relationships may begin quickly and feel exciting, passionate or adventurous.

You are available when the relationship is moving somewhere and when both partners share compatible goals, ambitions and pace. Stagnation can make you restless. In shadow, you may rush intimacy, turn differences into battles or try to push the relationship forward before emotional trust has developed.

Your lesson is to create direction together rather than dragging the other person behind you. Love requires movement, but not every emotional process can be accelerated by sheer determination

M8: Strength

You approach love honestly and seriously. Once you decide to commit, you are likely to be loyal, dependable and consistent, showing affection through actions rather than empty words.

Your emotional availability grows through trust, fairness and mutual respect. You may carry a strong need to remain composed and can suppress hurt or vulnerability. In shadow, this becomes control, perfectionism or an imbalance between giving and receiving.

Your lesson is to understand that emotional strength includes softness. You do not have to manage every feeling or remain invulnerable to be respected.

M9: The Hermit

You approach love cautiously and deeply. You are unlikely to open simply because someone is available; you need intellectual, emotional or spiritual substance.

You value independence, personal space and time to process feelings. Emotional intimacy can develop slowly, but when trust is established, your attachment may be genuine and lasting. In shadow, you may withdraw, hide your feelings or convince yourself solitude is safer while privately suffering from loneliness.

Your lesson is to distinguish healthy independence from emotional avoidance. A deep relationship requires allowing someone into your inner world rather than expecting them to wait indefinitely outside it.

M10: Wheel of Fortune

You approach love spontaneously and are most available when the relationship feels natural rather than forced. You may believe strongly in fate, timing, signs and unexpected meetings.

Your romantic life may move through cycles. At times you are adventurous and open; at others, uncertain or difficult to pin down. Heavy expectations, rigid plans or emotional pressure can cause you to pull away. In shadow, you may wait for destiny to fix things rather than making conscious choices.

Your lesson is to trust the flow without becoming passive. Relationships need space and spontaneity, but they also require consistency and personal responsibility.

M11: Justice

You approach relationships with passion, strength and a strong need for equality. Respect, honesty and fairness are essential, and you expect both people to contribute properly.

You are emotionally available when you believe the relationship is balanced and the partner is independent rather than dependent. High expectations can make you demanding of yourself and the other person. In shadow, disappointment can become criticism, control or a struggle over who is right.

Your lesson is to balance strength with empathy. Fairness is not merely dividing everything equally; it is understanding what each person genuinely needs.

M12: The Hanged Man

You approach love with compassion, empathy and a willingness to give deeply. You may naturally sense a partner’s feelings and want to help, support or heal them.

Your availability can become excessive. You may sacrifice your needs, tolerate unhealthy situations or believe love must involve waiting, suffering or proving devotion. Weak boundaries can attract partners who take more than they give.

Your lesson is to love without abandoning yourself. Service and compassion are beautiful only when they are chosen freely, not when they arise from guilt, fear or the belief that you do not deserve better.

M13: Death

You approach love as a transformative experience. Relationships are rarely casual or emotionally neutral; they tend to alter your life, identity or direction.

You need growth, movement and renewal to remain emotionally engaged. Stagnant connections can feel unbearable, and you may end relationships abruptly once you believe they have reached their natural end. Alternatively, fear of loss may make you cling to something already finished.

Your lesson is to allow relationships to evolve without constantly creating crisis. Change does not always require destruction, and an ending should not be forced merely because ordinary stability feels unfamiliar.

M14: Temperance

You approach love gently, patiently and with emotional sensitivity. You seek peace, sincerity and a connection in which both people can speak openly without constant drama.

You may be attracted to someone quite different from you, learning through contrast and compromise. You are available when the relationship feels emotionally safe and balanced. In shadow, you may avoid difficult conversations, wait too long for circumstances to improve or use distraction to suppress dissatisfaction.

Your lesson is to practise active harmony rather than passive endurance. Peace is created through honest communication, not by swallowing every uncomfortable feeling.

M15: The Devil

You approach love with intensity, magnetism, sensuality and powerful emotional desire. Attraction can feel immediate and consuming, and relationships may carry a strong karmic or addictive quality.

You are highly available to passion, but not always to vulnerability. Jealousy, control, temptation, power struggles or attachment may replace genuine emotional intimacy. You may also evaluate relationships through appearance, money, status or sexual chemistry.

Your lesson is self-mastery. You are not meant to reject passion but to enjoy it without losing independence, integrity or respect for the other person.

M16: The Tower

You approach relationships as catalysts for awakening and major change. Love may arrive during upheaval or become the force that exposes beliefs, defences and structures that no longer work.

You need a partner who can provide honesty, stability and support during periods of transformation. In shadow, fear, control or unresolved chaos can create breakups, emotional explosions or repeated rebuilding. You may expect relationships to collapse and therefore struggle to relax into security.

Your lesson is to build on truth rather than fear. A relationship does not need to be destroyed to become deeper, but whatever is false, controlling or unstable must be addressed.

M17: The Star

You approach love through inspiration, admiration and shared dreams. You want a partner who sees your potential, encourages your individuality and supports your creative or spiritual aspirations.

You are emotionally available when you feel appreciated and free to shine. When insecure, you may seek excessive attention, idealise a person from afar or confuse admiration with genuine intimacy. You can also hide your needs behind an attractive or confident exterior.

Your lesson is to create mutual admiration without dependency. You should not dim yourself for love, but neither should your partner exist merely as an audience for your light.

M18: The Moon

You approach love intuitively and emotionally. Connections can feel mystical, magnetic or fated, and you are highly sensitive to unspoken moods and subtle changes in a partner.

Your availability can become clouded by fear, fantasy or uncertainty. You may idealise someone, imagine rejection where none exists or become jealous without clear evidence. You can also present a version of yourself designed to keep love rather than showing who you truly are.

Your lesson is emotional clarity. Trust intuition, but verify it against reality. True intimacy cannot grow when fear, secrecy or imagination is allowed to replace honest communication.

M19: The Sun

You approach love warmly, generously and openly. You seek a joyful relationship in which affection is expressed clearly and both partners encourage one another to grow.

You are emotionally available when you feel seen, celebrated and appreciated. You often give a great deal of energy to the relationship, but may become dominant, demanding or disappointed when your warmth is not returned in the form you expect.

Your lesson is to balance giving and receiving. Shine alongside your partner rather than overshadowing them or making their admiration the proof of your worth.

M20: Judgement

You approach love as something karmic, meaningful and connected to family, ancestry or a higher purpose. Relationships may feel destined and may bring unresolved family patterns to the surface.

You value loyalty, mutual support and the creation of lasting bonds. However, resentment toward parents, former partners or family history can limit your availability. You may unconsciously expect a partner to repair wounds created long before they arrived.

Your lesson is to separate present love from inherited pain. Partnership can help heal ancestral patterns, but your partner should not be made responsible for your entire family history.

M21: The World

You approach love with openness, tolerance and a desire for expansion. You need a relationship that broadens your life rather than confines it, and may be attracted to people from different backgrounds, cultures or countries.

You value connection but also independence. You can remain respectful toward former partners and often see every relationship as part of a larger life journey. In shadow, impatience, constant expansion or fear of limitation can make ordinary commitment seem restrictive.

Your lesson is to recognise that freedom and commitment are not enemies. A relationship can offer roots while still allowing both partners to grow and explore.

M22: The Fool

You approach love freely, playfully and without excessive calculation. You need humour, spontaneity, adventure and room to remain an individual within the relationship.

You may be open-hearted but cautious of anything that feels like ownership or restriction. Unusual dynamics, distance, age differences or unconventional relationships may appeal to you. In shadow, freedom becomes avoidance, irresponsibility or an unwillingness to make clear commitments.

Your lesson is to remain free without becoming emotionally unavailable. Real freedom includes choosing responsibility consciously, respecting boundaries and allowing another person to rely on you.

ARCANA: THE MAGICIAN (1)

CORE KARMIC LESSON

Your soul is learning the responsible use of personal power. This position teaches independence, conscious leadership and the ability to create your own reality without controlling or manipulating others. The lesson is to become confident without becoming dominant, and influential without losing integrity.

HOW THIS ENERGY MANIFESTS

You naturally feel driven to lead, initiate and solve problems. Throughout life you may repeatedly find yourself in situations that test your confidence, self-belief and personal authority. You may feel responsible for everyone or believe success depends entirely on your own efforts.

SOUL GROWTH

The soul is learning that true strength comes through wisdom, humility and self-mastery. Leadership is earned through trust, honesty and consistency rather than force, status or ego. As confidence develops, you become someone who empowers others instead of controlling them.

SHADOW EXPRESSION

Pride, stubborn independence, manipulation, needing to be right, difficulty asking for help, perfectionism, fear of failure, overworking, controlling behaviour or hiding insecurity behind confidence.

HEALING & INTEGRATION

Develop healthy confidence without seeking constant validation. Learn to trust others, delegate responsibility and accept support. Use your intelligence and communication to inspire rather than dominate. Success comes when your actions are guided by integrity instead of ego.

KEY MESSAGE

Master yourself first, and your influence over the world will naturally follow.

ARCANA: THE HIGH PRIESTESS (2)

CORE KARMIC LESSON

Your soul is learning to trust inner wisdom while balancing intuition with reality. This position teaches patience, emotional intelligence and the ability to perceive what lies beneath the surface. The lesson is to develop quiet inner knowing without withdrawing from life or becoming trapped in fear, secrecy or passivity.

HOW THIS ENERGY MANIFESTS

You naturally sense the emotions, motives and energies of others, often knowing things before they happen. Throughout life you may experience periods of uncertainty, waiting or emotional withdrawal that encourage you to strengthen your intuition. You may keep your thoughts and feelings hidden, making it difficult for others to truly understand you.

SOUL GROWTH

The soul is learning that wisdom is not gained by remaining silent forever but by knowing when to observe and when to act. As you trust your intuition while remaining grounded, you become a calm source of guidance for others. Your greatest strength lies in combining spiritual awareness with practical action.

SHADOW EXPRESSION

Emotional withdrawal, secrecy, overthinking, fear of making decisions, mistrust, passivity, suppressing emotions, becoming isolated, relying on intuition without discernment, or allowing fear and doubt to prevent growth.

HEALING & INTEGRATION

Learn to trust your inner voice while communicating openly and honestly. Balance reflection with action. Release the need to hide your emotions or carry everything alone. Your intuition is a gift, but it becomes truly powerful when supported by wisdom, experience and authentic human connection.

KEY MESSAGE

True wisdom comes when intuition and action work together in harmony.

ARCANA: THE EMPRESS (3)

CORE KARMIC LESSON

Your soul is learning to create, nurture and receive with balance. This position teaches self-worth, abundance, emotional openness and the healthy expression of love and care. The lesson is to understand that true abundance begins with valuing yourself, not by constantly giving to or seeking approval from others.

HOW THIS ENERGY MANIFESTS

You naturally have a caring, creative and supportive nature. You may be drawn to helping, teaching, healing or creating beauty around you. Throughout life, you may experience lessons around relationships, family, motherhood, self-esteem or financial security. There can be a tendency to put everyone else's needs before your own or to measure your value by how much you give.

SOUL GROWTH

The soul is learning that nurturing yourself is just as important as nurturing others. As you develop healthy boundaries and recognise your own worth, you become capable of creating lasting abundance, meaningful relationships and emotional stability. Your creativity becomes a powerful force for growth rather than sacrifice.

SHADOW EXPRESSION

Over-giving, people-pleasing, emotional dependency, low self-worth, jealousy, possessiveness, overprotectiveness, seeking validation through relationships, neglecting your own needs, or attaching your value to money, appearance or external success.

HEALING & INTEGRATION

Learn to receive as comfortably as you give. Develop healthy boundaries without losing your compassion. Trust that you are worthy of love, success and abundance without needing to earn them through sacrifice. When you honour yourself, your natural ability to nurture and create flourishes in a balanced and sustainable way.

KEY MESSAGE

The abundance you seek begins with the value you place on yourself.

ARCANA: THE EMPEROR (4)

CORE KARMIC LESSON

Your soul is learning healthy authority, stability and responsible leadership. This position teaches you to create order and protection without becoming rigid, controlling or emotionally unavailable. The lesson is to build strong foundations while remembering that true authority is earned through fairness, consistency and respect.

HOW THIS ENERGY MANIFESTS

You naturally take responsibility and may become the organiser, provider or decision-maker in families, relationships and work. Life repeatedly places you in situations where structure, discipline and boundaries are required. You may feel safest when you are in control or believe that everything will collapse unless you manage it personally.

SOUL GROWTH

The soul is learning to lead without domination and to create security without suppressing emotion. As you combine discipline with compassion, you become a dependable presence who gives others confidence and direction. Your strength matures when you allow cooperation, flexibility and shared responsibility.

SHADOW EXPRESSION

Rigidity, controlling behaviour, stubbornness, emotional distance, workaholism, excessive responsibility, difficulty receiving advice, fear of vulnerability, harsh judgement, authoritarian behaviour or believing that compromise is weakness.

HEALING & INTEGRATION

Create clear boundaries while remaining open to dialogue and change. Delegate rather than carrying every burden alone. Allow emotions and human needs to exist alongside rules and responsibility. When strength is balanced with warmth, your leadership creates genuine safety rather than fear.

KEY MESSAGE

True authority protects, guides and strengthens others without taking away their freedom.

ARCANA: THE HIEROPHANT (5)

CORE KARMIC LESSON

Your soul is learning to develop personal truth, spiritual maturity and ethical wisdom. This position teaches you to question inherited beliefs, distinguish genuine knowledge from dogma and live according to values that have been tested through experience. The lesson is to become a wise guide without imposing your beliefs upon others.

HOW THIS ENERGY MANIFESTS

You may be drawn to study, teaching, religion, spirituality, counselling or systems of knowledge that explain life's deeper meaning. Life may repeatedly confront you with authority figures, traditions or moral dilemmas that force you to decide what you genuinely believe. Others may naturally seek your advice, even while you are still finding your own answers.

SOUL GROWTH

The soul is learning that wisdom grows through humility, lived experience and continued curiosity. As you integrate knowledge with compassion, you become capable of teaching without preaching and guiding without controlling. Your beliefs become a source of stability rather than restriction.

SHADOW EXPRESSION

Dogmatism, judgement, moral superiority, blindly following tradition, rebellion against all authority, fear of questioning beliefs, hypocrisy, giving unwanted advice, seeking approval from teachers or institutions, or confusing knowledge with wisdom.

HEALING & INTEGRATION

Examine inherited beliefs and keep what remains truthful and useful. Stay open to perspectives that challenge your certainty. Teach through example, listen before advising and allow others to follow their own path. Your wisdom becomes trustworthy when it remains compassionate, flexible and honest.

KEY MESSAGE

Live the truth you teach, and let experience turn knowledge into wisdom.

ARCANA: THE LOVERS (6)

CORE KARMIC LESSON

Your soul is learning conscious choice, self-respect and mature love. This position teaches you to make decisions from your values rather than fear, loneliness, attraction or the need for approval. The lesson is to form relationships without abandoning yourself and to understand that every meaningful choice creates a direction.

HOW THIS ENERGY MANIFESTS

Relationships, attraction and major life decisions become recurring teachers. You may experience intense connections, divided loyalties, indecision or situations where heart and mind appear to want different things. There may be a tendency to delay choices, seek reassurance from others or remain in unhealthy bonds because separation feels frightening.

SOUL GROWTH

The soul is learning that love becomes healthy when it is supported by honesty, boundaries and personal responsibility. As you know your values and communicate them clearly, relationships become partnerships rather than rescue missions. You learn to choose with integrity and accept the consequences of your decisions.

SHADOW EXPRESSION

Codependency, indecision, people-pleasing, fear of rejection, emotional triangles, idealising partners, abandoning personal needs, staying in relationships through guilt, confusing chemistry with compatibility, or expecting another person to complete you.

HEALING & INTEGRATION

Strengthen your relationship with yourself before making life-changing choices. Define your values, communicate honestly and stop asking others to decide your future. Choose relationships that support mutual respect, growth and accountability. Love should expand your identity, not erase it.

KEY MESSAGE

The right choice begins with self-respect and the courage to be honest.

ARCANA: THE CHARIOT (7)

CORE KARMIC LESSON

Your soul is learning direction, self-discipline and mastery of opposing forces. This position teaches you to move forward with purpose while controlling impatience, aggression and the need to win at any cost. The lesson is to direct your energy consciously rather than allowing ambition or emotion to drive you blindly.

HOW THIS ENERGY MANIFESTS

You are naturally determined and may experience life as a series of challenges, journeys, competitions or goals that demand persistence. You often feel compelled to act quickly and may struggle when progress is delayed. Life repeatedly tests whether you can remain focused without forcing outcomes or exhausting yourself.

SOUL GROWTH

The soul is learning that lasting victory begins with emotional regulation and clear intention. As you align willpower with patience, you become capable of overcoming significant obstacles and leading others through difficult transitions. Movement becomes purposeful rather than reactive.

SHADOW EXPRESSION

Impatience, aggression, burnout, recklessness, excessive competitiveness, emotional suppression, forcing progress, difficulty slowing down, abandoning goals when control is lost, or measuring worth entirely through achievement.

HEALING & INTEGRATION

Clarify where you are going before accelerating. Build routines that support endurance and learn to pause without interpreting rest as failure. Channel anger and urgency into constructive action. When inner conflict is mastered, your determination becomes an extraordinary force for progress.

KEY MESSAGE

Victory begins when your emotions and actions move in the same direction.

ARCANA: JUSTICE (8)

CORE KARMIC LESSON

Your soul is learning balance, accountability and the law of cause and effect. This position teaches you to act with integrity, accept responsibility for your choices and develop fairness without becoming cold or judgemental. The lesson is to understand that every decision creates consequences.

HOW THIS ENERGY MANIFESTS

Life repeatedly places you in situations involving justice, contracts, responsibility, truth, boundaries or unequal exchanges. You may be highly sensitive to unfairness and feel compelled to correct it. At times you may blame others, demand perfection or struggle to forgive mistakes, including your own.

SOUL GROWTH

The soul is learning to combine discernment with compassion. As you become honest about your own part in events, you gain the power to make cleaner choices and restore balance. You become someone others trust because your decisions are principled, measured and consistent.

SHADOW EXPRESSION

Harsh judgement, blame, resentment, perfectionism, emotional detachment, self-punishment, keeping score, refusing compromise, dishonesty, avoiding consequences or using fairness as a weapon.

HEALING & INTEGRATION

Review situations honestly without reducing people to their mistakes. Take responsibility where it belongs and release burdens that are not yours. Make decisions based on facts, values and long-term consequences rather than anger. Justice becomes healing when accountability includes compassion.

KEY MESSAGE

Every choice shapes the future, so choose with honesty and balance.

ARCANA: THE HERMIT (9)

CORE KARMIC LESSON

Your soul is learning inner wisdom, self-knowledge and meaningful service. This position teaches you to value solitude without becoming isolated and to turn personal experience into guidance that can help others. The lesson is to seek truth inwardly while remaining connected to life.

HOW THIS ENERGY MANIFESTS

You may be reflective, private and drawn to study, healing, research or spiritual inquiry. Life may bring periods of loneliness, separation or withdrawal that encourage deeper self-understanding. You may feel different from others or believe that no one fully understands the depth of your inner world.

SOUL GROWTH

The soul is learning that wisdom becomes complete when it is shared. As you accept your need for reflection without closing your heart, you become a thoughtful guide, teacher or healer. Your lived experience allows you to offer clarity without needing attention or recognition.

SHADOW EXPRESSION

Isolation, emotional withdrawal, overthinking, distrust, pessimism, intellectual superiority, fear of intimacy, refusing support, hiding behind independence, or remaining in observation instead of participating in life.

HEALING & INTEGRATION

Create regular space for reflection while maintaining supportive relationships. Share what you have learned instead of waiting until you feel perfectly prepared. Allow others to know you gradually and accept help when it is offered. Solitude should restore you, not imprison you.

KEY MESSAGE

Know yourself deeply, then let your wisdom become a light for others.

ARCANA: WHEEL OF FORTUNE (10)

CORE KARMIC LESSON

Your soul is learning adaptability, trust and conscious participation in life's cycles. This position teaches you to recognise turning points, accept change and use opportunity wisely rather than relying on luck or resisting what cannot remain the same.

HOW THIS ENERGY MANIFESTS

Life may move through noticeable highs and lows, sudden opportunities, reversals, repeated patterns or unexpected changes of direction. You may feel that external circumstances control your future, or you may chase excitement while struggling with consistency. The same lesson can return until a different choice is made.

SOUL GROWTH

The soul is learning to work with change rather than feeling victimised by it. As you recognise patterns and respond consciously, uncertainty becomes a source of growth. You develop resilience, timing and the ability to create momentum when opportunities appear.

SHADOW EXPRESSION

Resistance to change, fatalism, gambling with important decisions, inconsistency, repeating cycles, depending on luck, avoiding responsibility, becoming overconfident during success or hopeless during temporary setbacks.

HEALING & INTEGRATION

Notice the patterns that repeat and identify the choices that keep them alive. Build stable habits so that change does not remove your centre. Accept what has ended, respond to present opportunities and remember that fortune is most useful when supported by preparation and responsibility.

KEY MESSAGE

The wheel will turn, but your awareness determines how you travel with it.

ARCANA: STRENGTH (11)

CORE KARMIC LESSON

Your soul is learning inner strength, emotional mastery and compassionate courage. This position teaches you to work with powerful feelings and instincts without suppressing them or allowing them to control your behaviour. The lesson is to discover strength through patience rather than force.

HOW THIS ENERGY MANIFESTS

You may possess strong will, passion and resilience, attracting situations that require courage and endurance. Anger, desire, pride or intense emotion may become recurring tests. Others may see you as capable even when you are privately exhausted or afraid to show vulnerability.

SOUL GROWTH

The soul is learning that gentleness and strength are not opposites. As you understand your emotions instead of fighting them, you gain self-control, confidence and the ability to calm difficult situations. Your courage becomes encouraging rather than intimidating.

SHADOW EXPRESSION

Anger, domination, emotional suppression, pride, jealousy, impulsive reactions, physical or emotional exhaustion, refusing vulnerability, using force to gain compliance, or mistaking endurance for the need to tolerate everything.

HEALING & INTEGRATION

Name and process strong emotions before acting on them. Allow vulnerability, rest and support without seeing them as weakness. Channel passion through creative, physical or purposeful outlets. When power is guided by compassion, it becomes dependable and healing.

KEY MESSAGE

True strength is the courage to master yourself without hardening your heart.

ARCANA: THE HANGED MAN (12)

CORE KARMIC LESSON

Your soul is learning surrender, perspective and the wisdom of conscious pause. This position teaches you to release control, stop repeating sacrifice-based patterns and recognise that delays can reveal what constant effort has hidden.

HOW THIS ENERGY MANIFESTS

You may encounter periods of waiting, stagnation, sacrifice, dependency or circumstances that cannot be solved through force. You may give too much, feel responsible for rescuing others or remain suspended between an old life and a new one. Progress often begins only after your perspective changes.

SOUL GROWTH

The soul is learning to distinguish surrender from defeat. As you stop fighting what requires acceptance, deeper understanding emerges and new options become visible. You develop empathy, patience and the ability to guide others through uncertainty.

SHADOW EXPRESSION

Martyrdom, victim mentality, passivity, procrastination, self-sacrifice, rescuing others, guilt, emotional dependency, waiting for permission, refusing necessary change, or using spirituality to avoid practical action.

HEALING & INTEGRATION

Ask what the pause is trying to show you. Release obligations built on guilt and stop sacrificing yourself to maintain unhealthy situations. Accept what cannot be controlled, then take action where choice remains. A changed perspective can free energy that struggle has trapped.

KEY MESSAGE

The pause is not empty; it is preparing a wiser way forward.

ARCANA: DEATH (13)

CORE KARMIC LESSON

Your soul is learning transformation, release and the courage to let endings complete themselves. This position teaches you that change is unavoidable and that clinging to what has finished creates more suffering than the ending itself.

HOW THIS ENERGY MANIFESTS

Life may contain significant endings, reinventions, separations or periods when familiar identities and structures fall away. You may sense when something is over yet postpone the necessary change. At other times, you may cut things off abruptly to avoid the vulnerability of transition.

SOUL GROWTH

The soul is learning to trust renewal. As you grieve honestly and release what no longer serves growth, you gain emotional courage and the capacity to rebuild. You become skilled at helping others navigate profound change because you understand that endings can be sacred.

SHADOW EXPRESSION

Fear of loss, clinging to the past, emotional numbness, destructive endings, resistance to change, repeating expired situations, obsession with what has gone, or creating crisis because gradual change feels intolerable.

HEALING & INTEGRATION

Allow endings to be acknowledged, grieved and completed. Clear physical and emotional space for what comes next. Do not confuse familiarity with safety or transition with failure. Transformation becomes less frightening when you participate in it consciously.

KEY MESSAGE

What ends makes room for a life that could not begin while you were still holding on.

ARCANA: TEMPERANCE (14)

CORE KARMIC LESSON

Your soul is learning moderation, patience and the art of creating harmony from opposites. This position teaches you to avoid extremes, regulate energy and build lasting change through steady integration rather than dramatic swings.

HOW THIS ENERGY MANIFESTS

You may naturally mediate conflict and bring different people or ideas together. Life can repeatedly expose imbalances in work, health, emotion, spending, relationships or spiritual practice. You may alternate between overdoing and withdrawing, searching for a perfect balance that must actually be created daily.

SOUL GROWTH

The soul is learning consistency and emotional alchemy. As you combine discipline with flexibility, you become a stabilising influence who helps situations heal gradually. Your gift lies in blending what appears incompatible into something useful and whole.

SHADOW EXPRESSION

Excess, inconsistency, emotional extremes, impatience, avoidance of conflict, addictive patterns, overcompromise, loss of identity, trying to keep everyone happy, or abandoning routines when results are not immediate.

HEALING & INTEGRATION

Choose sustainable habits over dramatic promises. Notice where energy leaks through excess or avoidance. Practise patience with gradual progress and communicate before resentment builds. Balance is not a permanent state; it is a series of conscious adjustments.

KEY MESSAGE

Harmony is created through the small balanced choices you make each day.

ARCANA: THE DEVIL (15)

CORE KARMIC LESSON

Your soul is learning freedom from attachment, unconscious desire and the misuse of power. This position teaches you to recognise the chains created by fear, control, shame, addiction, money, sexuality or emotional dependency. The lesson is to reclaim choice without denying your human desires.

HOW THIS ENERGY MANIFESTS

You may encounter intense attraction, ambition, material opportunity or relationships that expose hidden needs and power dynamics. Temptation and control can become recurring themes. You may know that a pattern is harmful yet feel unable to stop because it provides temporary pleasure, security or avoidance.

SOUL GROWTH

The soul is learning that awareness restores freedom. As you face desire honestly and accept responsibility for your choices, compulsive patterns lose their power. You can then use passion, charisma and material intelligence creatively rather than destructively.

SHADOW EXPRESSION

Addiction, obsession, jealousy, manipulation, control, secrecy, shame, greed, toxic relationships, compulsive behaviour, fear of poverty, using sexuality or money for power, or blaming others for choices you continue to make.

HEALING & INTEGRATION

Identify what the attachment gives you and what it costs. Replace secrecy with honest support and create practical boundaries around destructive habits. Do not shame desire; understand and direct it. Freedom develops when repeated choices align with your long-term wellbeing.

KEY MESSAGE

The chains loosen the moment you stop denying that you have the key.

ARCANA: THE TOWER (16)

CORE KARMIC LESSON

Your soul is learning truth, humility and the courage to rebuild on stronger foundations. This position teaches you that structures based on denial, pride or false security will eventually collapse so that something more authentic can emerge.

HOW THIS ENERGY MANIFESTS

Life may bring sudden changes, revelations, separations or disruptions that expose what was unstable beneath the surface. You may try to maintain situations long after their truth is visible, or repeatedly experience crisis until necessary change is accepted.

SOUL GROWTH

The soul is learning that destruction and liberation can arrive together. As you release false identities and rebuild consciously, you develop resilience, honesty and the ability to create foundations that can withstand reality. You become less afraid of change because you trust your capacity to begin again.

SHADOW EXPRESSION

Denial, pride, explosive conflict, fear of change, rebuilding the same unstable pattern, blaming others for collapse, self-sabotage, clinging to appearances, provoking crisis, or believing that losing a structure means losing yourself.

HEALING & INTEGRATION

Face warning signs before they become emergencies. Let truth guide decisions even when it disrupts comfort. Rebuild slowly, using experience rather than urgency. Ask what the collapse has freed you from and what must be different this time.

KEY MESSAGE

What falls through truth creates space for a life built on something real.

ARCANA: THE STAR (17)

CORE KARMIC LESSON

Your soul is learning hope, authenticity and faith in your unique gifts. This position teaches you to remain open to inspiration while turning dreams into grounded action. The lesson is to shine without depending on admiration or comparing your path with others.

HOW THIS ENERGY MANIFESTS

You may be visionary, creative or naturally able to encourage people during difficult periods. Life may place you in visible roles or give you dreams that feel larger than ordinary expectations. At times, disappointment or comparison can make you doubt your abilities and withdraw.

SOUL GROWTH

The soul is learning that hope becomes powerful when it is embodied. As you trust your gifts and practise them consistently, you become a source of renewal for others. Your authenticity gives people permission to believe in possibilities they had forgotten.

SHADOW EXPRESSION

Self-doubt, unrealistic idealism, seeking recognition, comparison, disappointment, passivity, waiting to be discovered, giving away energy to gain approval, or hiding gifts because success feels exposing.

HEALING & INTEGRATION

Protect inspiration with practical routines and measurable action. Stop comparing your beginning with another person's established path. Share your work before it feels perfect and allow hope to coexist with effort. Your light is useful when it is visible and grounded.

KEY MESSAGE

Trust the gift, practise it faithfully and let your light serve a real purpose.

ARCANA: THE MOON (18)

CORE KARMIC LESSON

Your soul is learning emotional clarity, intuition and freedom from illusion. This position teaches you to explore the subconscious without becoming ruled by fear, fantasy or uncertainty. The lesson is to distinguish genuine inner guidance from anxiety and projection.

HOW THIS ENERGY MANIFESTS

You may be highly sensitive to atmosphere, dreams and unspoken emotion. Life can bring confusing relationships, hidden information, anxiety or periods when certainty is unavailable. You may absorb the feelings of others or imagine worst-case outcomes when facts are incomplete.

SOUL GROWTH

The soul is learning to make the unconscious conscious. As you face hidden fears and verify intuitive impressions, sensitivity becomes wisdom rather than overwhelm. You develop compassion, imagination and the ability to navigate emotional complexity without losing reality.

SHADOW EXPRESSION

Anxiety, suspicion, deception, escapism, projection, moodiness, confusion, emotional dependency, fantasy, avoiding facts, absorbing others' emotions, or mistaking fear for intuition.

HEALING & INTEGRATION

Ground intuitive impressions in evidence and direct communication. Create routines that regulate sleep, emotion and sensory overload. Explore fears through reflection, therapy, creativity or spiritual practice without allowing them to dictate decisions. Clarity grows when what is hidden is gently examined.

KEY MESSAGE

The path becomes visible when you face the fear that made it seem dark.

ARCANA: THE SUN (19)

CORE KARMIC LESSON

Your soul is learning authentic self-expression, healthy confidence and the generous use of personal light. This position teaches you to enjoy recognition and success without becoming dependent on applause, pride or the need to appear endlessly positive.

HOW THIS ENERGY MANIFESTS

You may naturally attract attention, uplift others or bring warmth into groups. Themes around visibility, achievement, children, creativity or recognition may repeat. You may feel pressure to perform happiness, prove your worth or hide difficulties so that others continue to see you as strong.

SOUL GROWTH

The soul is learning to shine from self-acceptance rather than validation. As confidence becomes genuine, you celebrate your own gifts while encouraging the gifts of others. Joy becomes resilient because it is no longer dependent on being admired.

SHADOW EXPRESSION

Pride, attention-seeking, arrogance, childish reactions, fear of criticism, overconfidence, hiding pain behind positivity, competitiveness, needing praise, or dimming yourself because visibility feels unsafe.

HEALING & INTEGRATION

Let yourself be seen honestly, including the parts that are still learning. Celebrate achievement without comparing or dominating. Receive praise without making it your identity, and share opportunities generously. Confidence grows stronger when it includes humility and emotional truth.

KEY MESSAGE

Shine because it is natural to you, not because you need others to confirm your light.

ARCANA: JUDGEMENT (20)

CORE KARMIC LESSON

Your soul is learning awakening, forgiveness and release from inherited or past-based judgement. This position teaches you to answer a deeper calling, complete old karmic cycles and stop allowing guilt, family history or previous mistakes to define your future.

HOW THIS ENERGY MANIFESTS

Life may bring powerful turning points, family patterns, second chances or moments when the past returns for resolution. You may feel called towards meaningful work or pressured to live according to family expectations. Judgement, guilt and unfinished history can repeatedly influence decisions.

SOUL GROWTH

The soul is learning to review the past without remaining imprisoned by it. As you forgive, take responsibility and make a conscious new choice, ancestral and personal patterns begin to change. You become capable of helping others awaken to possibilities beyond their history.

SHADOW EXPRESSION

Guilt, self-condemnation, harsh judgement, living in the past, repeating family patterns, fear of answering a calling, blaming ancestry for every difficulty, refusing forgiveness, or waiting for others to approve your transformation.

HEALING & INTEGRATION

Separate accountability from lifelong punishment. Identify inherited beliefs and decide which ones end with you. Make amends where possible, forgive what cannot be changed and act on the life that is calling you now. Awakening requires a decision, not merely an insight.

KEY MESSAGE

The past explains part of your story, but it does not have the authority to write the ending.

ARCANA: THE WORLD (21)

CORE KARMIC LESSON

Your soul is learning completion, wholeness and the ability to integrate every life experience into wisdom. This position teaches you to finish what you begin, embrace your place in the wider world and recognise that every ending marks the successful completion of a soul lesson. The lesson is to stop searching for fulfilment outside yourself and realise that it comes from living in alignment with your true purpose.

HOW THIS ENERGY MANIFESTS

You naturally seek growth, expansion and meaningful achievement. Throughout life, you may be drawn towards travel, different cultures, teaching, sharing knowledge or projects that have a wider impact. Life repeatedly presents opportunities to complete old cycles before moving into new ones. You are encouraged to think beyond personal success and consider how your gifts can benefit others.

SOUL GROWTH

The soul is learning that fulfilment comes from integration rather than constant striving. As you accept every success, failure and challenge as part of your development, you gain confidence, wisdom and emotional maturity. You become someone who naturally brings people, ideas and experiences together, helping others see the bigger picture while continuing your own evolution.

SHADOW EXPRESSION

Fear of completion, constantly chasing the next goal, difficulty letting go, perfectionism, feeling incomplete despite success, overcommitting, avoiding closure, believing happiness is always somewhere else, or failing to appreciate how far you have already come.

HEALING & INTEGRATION

Celebrate your achievements without immediately moving on to the next challenge. Allow yourself to complete chapters fully before beginning new ones. Trust that you already possess many of the qualities you have been searching for. As you recognise your own wholeness, life becomes less about proving yourself and more about sharing your experience, wisdom and gifts with the world.

KEY MESSAGE

Wholeness is not something you must find. It is something you discover when you honour every part of your journey.

ARCANA: THE FOOL (22)

CORE KARMIC LESSON

Your soul is learning trust, freedom and conscious new beginnings. This position teaches you to embrace life's journey with openness while balancing spontaneity with responsibility. The lesson is to remain curious and optimistic without becoming careless, naïve or avoiding commitment.

HOW THIS ENERGY MANIFESTS

You naturally seek freedom, adventure and new experiences. Throughout life, you may be drawn towards change, travel, unconventional paths or opportunities that require faith rather than certainty. You often find yourself starting new chapters, but your greatest lesson is learning to complete what truly matters instead of constantly chasing the next opportunity.

SOUL GROWTH

The soul is learning that freedom is not the absence of responsibility but the ability to make conscious choices without fear. As you develop trust in yourself and your journey, you become more willing to take inspired risks while remaining grounded in wisdom. Your optimism becomes a source of encouragement, helping others believe that new beginnings are always possible.

SHADOW EXPRESSION

Impulsiveness, irresponsibility, avoidance of commitment, immaturity, inconsistency, poor judgement, unrealistic optimism, escapism, fear of settling down, unfinished projects, ignoring consequences or believing that freedom means living without accountability.

HEALING & INTEGRATION

Embrace new opportunities while taking responsibility for your choices. Learn to combine enthusiasm with planning and faith with discernment. Complete the lessons you begin before seeking the next adventure. As you balance freedom with maturity, your life becomes an inspiring example of courage, authenticity and limitless potential.

KEY MESSAGE

True freedom comes when you trust the journey while accepting responsibility for every step you choose to take.

R1 – The Magician

Relationship Problems with Your Partner

The Magician's biggest challenge in relationships often comes from wanting everything to happen on their own terms. They can become so focused on personal ambitions, achievements or proving themselves that their partner begins to feel overlooked or emotionally unimportant. Communication may gradually become more about solving problems than sharing feelings.

Another difficulty is the tendency to believe they always know the best way forward. This can lead to controlling conversations, dismissing a partner's ideas or trying to direct the relationship instead of allowing it to develop naturally as a team.

Conflict usually appears when both partners compete to be right rather than trying to understand one another. Small disagreements can become battles of pride, making compromise more difficult than it needs to be.

The relationship improves when the Magician learns that real strength comes through cooperation rather than control. Listening more, allowing vulnerability and recognising a partner as an equal creates a relationship where both people feel valued instead of managed.

R2 – The High Priestess

Relationship Problems with Your Partner

The High Priestess can create distance without meaning to. Feelings are often kept hidden, important conversations are avoided and a partner may be left guessing what is really happening beneath the surface. Silence can slowly replace genuine communication.

There is also a tendency to withdraw emotionally when hurt instead of explaining what is wrong. This creates misunderstanding, as one partner waits for the other to somehow instinctively know what they are feeling.

Relationships can become stuck when too many assumptions replace honest conversations. Doubts, uncertainty and overthinking may gradually weaken trust if they are never spoken about openly.

The relationship becomes much stronger when the High Priestess learns to express emotions more freely, share concerns before they become resentment and trust that vulnerability strengthens love rather than weakens it.

R3 – The Empress

Relationship Problems with Your Partner

The Empress naturally gives love, care and support, but relationships become unbalanced when too much energy is invested in everyone else's happiness while personal needs are ignored. Over time this can lead to disappointment, frustration or feeling unappreciated.

Another challenge is allowing family members, friends or outside influences to interfere with the relationship. Trying to please everyone can create tension between partners and make it difficult for the relationship to develop its own identity.

There may also be unrealistic expectations that love should always feel effortless. When everyday responsibilities replace romance, dissatisfaction can quietly grow unless both partners continue making time for one another.

The relationship flourishes when healthy boundaries are created, both partners share responsibility equally and love is given without losing sight of personal needs, mutual respect and honest communication.

R4 – The Emperor

Relationship Problems with Your Partner

The Emperor can create relationship problems through an excessive need for control. They often feel safest when they are making the decisions, setting the rules and directing how the relationship should work. Although this may come from a genuine desire to protect the partnership and create stability, their partner can begin to feel managed rather than loved.

Conflict may arise when the Emperor struggles to accept a different opinion or way of doing things. They can become stubborn, authoritative or convinced that their approach is the only sensible one. Discussions then turn into power struggles, with one person trying to lead and the other fighting to be heard.

There can also be an imbalance in responsibility. The Emperor may take on everything, then become frustrated that their partner is not contributing enough. Alternatively, they may expect their partner to follow their plans without giving them an equal say. Work, status, finances or practical responsibilities can take priority over affection, tenderness and emotional connection.

The relationship may become especially strained if criticism is taken as disrespect. Instead of admitting vulnerability or acknowledging a mistake, the Emperor may become defensive, distant or more controlling. Their partner can eventually feel intimidated, undervalued or emotionally shut out.

The relationship improves when the Emperor understands that leadership within love is not the same as authority over another person. Sharing decisions, listening without immediately correcting, and allowing a partner their own independence creates greater trust. Stability is still important, but it must be built through cooperation, warmth and mutual respect rather than rules, pressure or control.

R5 – The Hierophant

Relationship Problems with Your Partner

The Hierophant creates relationship problems when structure becomes more important than understanding. Strong values and principles are one of this energy's greatest strengths, but when taken to extremes they can lead to criticism, inflexibility and unrealistic expectations of a partner.

Arguments often develop because one person believes there is only one correct way to think, behave or live. Instead of accepting differences, they may try to educate, correct or change their partner. Over time, this can leave the relationship feeling restrictive rather than supportive.

Outside influences may also become a source of tension. Family expectations, traditions or the opinions of respected authority figures can interfere with the couple's ability to make their own decisions. One partner may feel they are always competing with someone else's standards.

This combination (15-20-5) in the Karmic Tail (M-N-D) is known as the Rebel program. You carry a powerful, independent energy that challenges convention and seeks truth. You are here to break outdated family patterns or societal conditioning and establish a life based on your own authentic principles.

The Magician. The Pioneer.** 

_Only in the personal forecast — in the year of birth and at ages 20, 40, 60 (at 40 and 60 as the second energy)._ 

This is one of the most powerful periods in a person’s life. Everything you conceive has a chance to take form. Ideas find shape, plans come to life, doors open where before there was a dead end. This is a time of active movement forward. New knowledge, new contacts, new projects. The mind is literally tuned to absorb information — learn, soak it up, grow. Promotions, business launches, creative breakthroughs are all possible. 

You are seen. You are heard. In this period you are able to inspire others — simply by your presence and your word.

The main trap of this period is overconfidence. A sense of superiority can turn into conflicts and a loss of authority. Watch your documents — mistakes and misunderstandings are possible. Control your thoughts — in this period they materialize with doubled force.

Set goals and write them down. Seek collaboration with professionals. Strengthen the body — especially the spine and the lower part. Practice meditation. Visit places of power. And work on your self-worth — this period manifests exactly as much as you believe in yourself.

The High Priestess. Unity and Harmony.** 

### _In the personal forecast — in the year of birth, and at ages 10, 20, 40, and 60. In a couple’s forecast it appears extremely rarely._ 

This is a period of silence and depth. A time when there’s no need to storm and conquer — there’s a need to listen. Listen to yourself, listen to life, trust what is happening. 

Intuition sharpens to its limit in this period. Information that was long hidden may open to you. Secrets surface, the concealed comes to light. Don’t ask — just observe. The answers will come on their own. 

This is a soft, spiritual period. A good time for learning, gathering information, developing inner abilities. Relationships with the mother and the women of the lineage come to the foreground — it’s important to harmonize them. Joyful events connected with children are possible.

The main trap is trying to control everything with logic. It doesn’t work here. Also dangerous are intrigues, gossip, participation in others’ games. A third party may appear in the relationship — a woman who brings instability. Watch the information you pass on and receive.

Trust your intuition — in this period it is your main instrument. Record important promises in writing. Practice yoga, meditation, pranayama. Create a harmonious space around you. Watch your nutrition — more natural and plant-based. And remember — the world is not divided into black and white.

The Empress. Fertility and Femininity.** 

### _One of the richest periods — both for the personal forecast and for the couple._ **Personal forecast** 

This is a time when feminine energy comes to the foreground — in both partners, regardless of gender. Emotionality, intuition, creativity, beauty, the desire to surround yourself with comfort and fullness — all of this blossoms in this period. 

The material sphere strengthens. Income, real estate purchases, career advancements are possible. Creative ideas come to life easily. The period is favorable for relationships — a romantic, courtship stage, conversations about continuing the family, attention from the opposite sex. **For a woman** — this is the peak of femininity and desirability, a chance to marry, become a mother, gain a home and status. 

**For a man** — a period when he naturally takes on the role of provider and is surrounded by women’s attention. 

The main trap is the loss of balance. A woman may slip into aggression and control, taking on masculine roles. A man may lose his masculinity, or on the contrary, slip into idleness. It’s important to stay in your own nature.

for the personal forecast 

For women — manicures, spa, jewelry, time with friends, get-togethers, repairing broken jewelry. Mend the relationship with your mother. Delegate domestic tasks. For men — do something kind for the women of the lineage, voice your boundaries to your partner, take responsibility.

The Emperor. Power and Responsibility.** 

### **Personal forecast** 

This is a powerful period of masculine energy — in both partners regardless of gender. Persistence, decisiveness, organization, logic, active action. A period when you can and should take on responsibility — and get results for it. 

Career advancements, opening a business, promotions, new positions — all of this becomes real precisely now. Government matters and documents are resolved successfully. Rewards arrive for past investments. 

**For a man** — one of the best periods for strengthening himself as a leader, provider, father. A very money-rich energy. It’s important not to miss the moment and to act. 

**For a woman** — a fateful meeting with a man or the patronage of an influential man is possible. But it’s important to make sure you don’t slip into masculine roles — otherwise the energy will start to press on the relationship. 

The main trap for a woman is taking on too many masculine duties and crushing her partner with authority. The main trap for a man is slipping into rebellion or passivity when responsibility is needed.

for the personal forecast 

**For women** — be softer, accept the man, learn to ask rather than do it all yourself. Work through the relationship with the father. Wear feminine clothing. 

**For men** — take responsibility consciously, set goals in writing, give time to family and not only to career. Work through the relationship with the mother. 

###

The Hierophant. Student and Teacher. Family.** 

### **Personal forecast** 

This is a period when family, traditions, and the transmission of knowledge come to the foreground. Everything connected with the lineage, with roots, with relationships between generations — becomes especially important. 

The period is favorable for learning and spiritual growth. A mentor may appear on your path — someone ready to pass on knowledge and experience. Or, on the contrary — you yourself become a teacher for someone. In this period it’s important not only to accumulate knowledge but to pass it on. 

Official matters are resolved successfully. A good time for processing documents, entering into marriage, legal questions. Career advancement is possible through authority and the respect of those around you. 

The main trap is living someone else’s life instead of your own. Clinging too much to relatives, putting yourself in the victim position, lecturing those who didn’t ask. Also dangerous are false teachers and spiritual intoxication.

for the personal forecast 

Put things in order — literally and figuratively. Systematize documents, keep a routine, respect others’ time. Create family traditions. Accept your father — this is the key work of the period. Learn — and immediately pass the knowledge on. 

###

The Lovers. Relationships, Choice, and Unconditional Love.** 

### **Personal forecast** 

One of the most beautiful and vivid periods in life. Much celebration, laughter, heartfelt conversations, pleasant meetings. Everything connected with beauty, love, and harmony — blossoms. 

This is a time of new relationships — not only romantic but also business. For those already in a couple — a wonderful moment for deepening closeness or planning a child. The single may meet a great love. 

A period of right choice — but precisely from the heart, not from the head. Work that isn’t to your liking will drain you. Only what you love — will give results. Communications blossom. Much interaction, new contacts, friends. Hobbies may grow into a profession. Creative projects launch easily and joyfully. The main trap is living by someone else’s script, pleasing everyone, losing yourself. Also dangerous are betrayals, love triangles, betrayals by friends. All of this is given to teach you to distinguish the real from the unreal.

for the personal forecast 

Speak of love — aloud, to loved ones and to yourself. Tend to your appearance and body. Give gifts without expectations. Open the heart through metta meditation. When choosing — listen to the body, not logic. Watch your heart — in the literal sense. 

###

The Chariot. Movement and Victory.** 

### **Personal forecast** 

This is a period of true breakthrough. A time when you’re like a tank — decisive, driving, seeing no obstacles. Everything that once seemed impossible — becomes achievable precisely now. Career victories, opening a business, launching projects, promotions — all of this is supported by the energy of the period. Travel, relocations, getting a license, sports are favorable. The energy of a winner accompanies you. 

In relationships — an active sexual life, marriage is possible.
